Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length."},"cancelOrder(uint256)":{"params":{"orderId":"The order ID"}},"claimWinnings(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of winning tokens to claim","wordId":"The word ID"}},"createCompleteSets(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Number of complete sets to create","wordId":"The word ID"}},"createEvent(string)":{"params":{"name":"The name of the event"},"returns":{"_0":"eventId The ID of the created event"}},"fillOrder(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to fill","orderId":"The order ID to fill"}},"getBestOrders(uint256,uint8,uint8,uint256)":{"params":{"limit":"Maximum number of orders to return","orderType":"BUY or SELL","outcome":"YES or NO","wordId":"The word ID"},"returns":{"amounts":"Array of available amounts","orderIds":"Array of order IDs","prices":"Array of prices"}},"isApprovedForAll(address,address)":{"details":"Returns true if `operator` is approved to transfer ``account``'s tokens. See {setApprovalForAll}."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"placeLimitOrder(uint256,uint8,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Number of contracts","orderType":"BUY or SELL","outcome":"YES or NO","price":"Price in USDC (scaled by 1e6, 0 to 1e6)","wordId":"The word ID"},"returns":{"_0":"orderId The ID of the created order"}},"redeemCompleteSets(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Number of complete sets to redeem","wordId":"The word ID"}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"resolveWord(uint256,uint8)":{"params":{"outcome":"The resolution outcome (YES or NO)","wordId":"The word ID"}},"resolveWordsBulk(uint256[],uint8[])":{"params":{"outcomes":"Array of outcomes","wordIds":"Array of word IDs"}},"safeBatchTransferFrom(address,address,uint256[],uint256[],bytes)":{"details":"xref:ROOT:erc1155.adoc#batch-operations[Batched] version of {safeTransferFrom}. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits either a {TransferSingle} or a {TransferBatch} event, depending on the length of the array arguments. Requirements: - `ids` and `values` must have the same length. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} and return the acceptance magic value."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Transfers a `value` amount of tokens of type `id` from `from` to `to`. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits a {TransferSingle} event. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been approved to spend ``from``'s tokens via {setApprovalForAll}. - `from` must have a balance of tokens of type `id` of at least `value` amount. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} and return the acceptance magic value."},"setApprovalForAll(address,bool)":{"details":"Grants or revokes permission to `operator` to transfer the caller's tokens, according to `approved`, Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event. Requirements: - `operator` cannot be the zero address."},"setEventState(uint256,uint8)":{"params":{"eventId":"The event ID","newState":"The new state"}},"setTradingFee(uint256)":{"params":{"newFeeBps":"New fee in basis points (0-10000)"}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"uri(uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC1155MetadataURI-uri}. This implementation returns the same URI for *all* token types. It relies on the token type ID substitution mechanism https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1155#metadata[defined in the ERC]. Clients calling this function must replace the `\\{id\\}` substring with the actual token type ID."},"withdrawFees(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to withdraw","recipient":"Address to returns._0: wordId The ID of the added word
wordIds Array of created word IDs

balanceOf(address,uint256).details: Returns the value of tokens of token type `id` owned by `account`.

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

params.amount: Amount of winning tokens to claim
Number of complete sets to create

returns._0: eventId The ID of the created event

params.limit: Maximum number of orders to return

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns true if `operator` is approved to transfer ``account``'s tokens. See {setApprovalForAll}.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

returns._0: orderId The ID of the created order

params.amount: Number of complete sets to redeem

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeBatchTransferFrom(address,address,ui.details: xref:ROOT:erc1155.adoc#batch-operations[Batched] version of {safeTransferFrom}. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits either a {TransferSingle} or a {TransferBatch} event, depending on the length of the array arguments. Requirements: - `ids` and `values` must have the same length. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155BatchReceived} and return the acceptance magic value.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Transfers a `value` amount of tokens of type `id` from `from` to `to`. WARNING: This function can potentially allow a reentrancy attack when transferring tokens to an untrusted contract, when invoking {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} on the receiver. Ensure to follow the checks-effects-interactions pattern and consider employing reentrancy guards when interacting with untrusted contracts. Emits a {TransferSingle} event. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been approved to spend ``from``'s tokens via {setApprovalForAll}. - `from` must have a balance of tokens of type `id` of at least `value` amount. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC1155Receiver-onERC1155Received} and return the acceptance magic value.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes permission to `operator` to transfer the caller's tokens, according to `approved`, Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event. Requirements: - `operator` cannot be the zero address.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

uri(uint256).details: See {IERC1155MetadataURI-uri}. This implementation returns the same URI for *all* token types. It relies on the token type ID substitution mechanism https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1155#metadata[defined in the ERC]. Clients calling this function must replace the `\{id\}` substring with the actual token type ID.

addWord(uint256,string).notice: Add a single word to an event

addWordsBulk(uint256,string[]).notice: Add multiple words to an event in bulk

cancelOrder(uint256).notice: Cancel an order and refund collateral

createCompleteSets(uint256,uint256).notice: Create complete sets (1 YES + 1 NO) by depositing USDC

getBestOrders(uint256,uint8,uint8,uint25.notice: Get best available orders for a market

redeemCompleteSets(uint256,uint256).notice: Redeem complete sets (1 YES + 1 NO) for USDC

resolveWord(uint256,uint8).notice: Resolve a word and close the market

setEventState(uint256,uint8).notice: Set the state of an event
